body.title: Create /diagnose skill; add DEPRECATED header to old device debug skills
body.result: /diagnose skill created (device-agnostic Steps 1-3); DEPRECATED headers on debug-pe-chain, igor-diagnose, cognition-debug; cc_skills mirrored
body.description:
Create a unified /diagnose <device> skill that works for any rack device. Usage: `/diagnose igor`, `/diagnose queue`, `/diagnose librarian`.

Skill steps:
1. Read device name from arg (default: igor). Call DiagnosticBase.last_traces(n=20) for that device — surface as a timeline of recent events.
2. If device is `igor`: also show pe_chain basket last-state (reuse the key steps from /debug-pe-chain — basket init + phase inspection). For any device: if debug_mode is not set, suggest enabling it for richer trace.
3. Categorize the presenting issue as: A (code bug — exception/assertion in trace), B (state corruption — unexpected values in data fields), C (external noise — network/DB/env), or D (unknown). Suggest one targeted action.

Deprecate old skills by adding DEPRECATED header to:
- ~/.claude/skills/debug-pe-chain/SKILL.md
- ~/.claude/skills/igor-diagnose/SKILL.md
- ~/.claude/skills/cognition-debug/SKILL.md

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/diagnose/SKILL.md (new), ~/.claude/skills/debug-pe-chain/SKILL.md (DEPRECATED header), ~/.claude/skills/igor-diagnose/SKILL.md (DEPRECATED header), ~/.claude/skills/cognition-debug/SKILL.md (DEPRECATED header), ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/ mirrors of all four
**Design rules:** skill must gracefully degrade when device is offline (last_traces may return empty); MCP-first approach
**Scope boundary:** /diagnose creation + DEPRECATED headers; NOT remove old skill files (stubs remain for one sprint cycle as redirect markers)
**Test plan:** no automated tests (skill files); visual verify: diagnose/SKILL.md exists with Steps 1-3; all three deprecated skills show DEPRECATED header with pointer to `/diagnose <device>`
